pr.title: Accounts: overflow menu for edit/remove (less clutter)
pr.body: ## Summary Reduces visual noise on account tiles by replacing **Edit**, **Delete**, and **Disconnect** with a **single overflow control (⋮)** and a compact dropdown. ## Rationale - **Edit / Remove** are secondary; the card’s primary action remains opening transactions. - **Delete vs Disconnect** duplicated the confirm modal’s language; the menu uses **Remove…** vs **Disconnect…** as a short hint while the modal keeps full context. ## Behavior - **⋮** opens a small menu: **Edit account** (manual-only, unchanged rules) and **Remove…** or **Disconnect…** (opens the same remove flow as before). - **Click outside** (capture listener) closes the menu; opening edit/delete clears it as well. ## Validation - `npm run lint`
pr.author: Freedomfarms
